title: DebuggingHeader - Metadata API
description: Specifies that the deployment result contains the debug log output, and specifies the level of detail included in the log. The debug log contains the output of Apex tests that are executed as part of a deployment.

categories.description: A list of log categories with their associated log levels.

debugLevel.description: Deprecated. This field is provided only for backward compatibility. If you provide values for both debugLevel and categories, the categories value is used. The debugLevel field specifies the type of information returned in the debug log. The values are listed from the least amount of information returned to the most information returned. Valid values include: None Debugonly Db Profiling Callout Detail
